title: Ship Built-in Event Types
description: Well-known event types provided by Ship. Skills reference these by name in their events.json "ship" array instead of redeclaring common interaction patterns.

annotation.label: Annotation
annotation.description: User clicked and annotated an element on a rendered surface. Fired by the Ship SDK when annotation mode is active.

selector.description: CSS selector of the annotated element.

artifact.description: Filename or identifier of the artifact being annotated.

feedback.label: Feedback
feedback.description: User approved, rejected, or commented on an artifact or agent action.

artifact.description: Filename or identifier of the artifact being reviewed.

selection.label: Selection
selection.description: User selected or highlighted content on a rendered surface.

selector.description: CSS selector of the element containing the selection.

artifact.description: Filename or identifier of the artifact.

artifact_created.label: Artifact Created
artifact_created.description: Agent created a new artifact file in the skill's session namespace.

mime_type.description: MIME type of the artifact. e.g. text/html, image/png, text/markdown.

artifact_deleted.label: Artifact Deleted
artifact_deleted.description: An artifact was removed. Can be triggered by human (rejecting) or agent (cleanup).
